notes: Added a "Check for Updates" button to /setup, so you can check right away instead of waiting for the automatic check.
Fixed: after installing an update, the program reopened in a visible console window instead of staying hidden in the background like normal.

Fixed: the auto-start shortcut could get stuck behind a Windows security prompt on every boot, since the launcher files were still marked as "downloaded from the internet". They now unblock themselves automatically the first time you run them.
The bot now also checks for updates periodically while running (not just on startup), so it notices new versions even if you never restart it — without repeating the same notification.
Fixed a critical bug: using /feedback crashed the entire bot (not just that command) because of a text field label that was too long for Discord's limit.
Fixed: if you opened the program before inviting the bot to your server, it could automatically leave that server the next time it restarted, thinking it wasn't authorized.
Fixed: slash commands weren't showing up if the bot joined a server after the program was already running — now they register right away when it joins.
Channels with a real command (Cards, Wishlist, Extract XLM, Auto Trade, Settings) now show the actual working panel as soon as they're created, instead of a generic description.
The setup wizard now shows the S4T and Heartbeat addresses to use in your reroll tool right on the "Saved" screen.
Feedback now supports a title, an optional screenshot, and shows your Discord profile.
Fixed: channel panels sometimes appeared duplicated when editing them.
Panels now move to the bottom of the channel automatically after 5 minutes of use, and always move there when you run the command by hand.
Fixed: "Sync Channels" now detects and repairs webhooks that stopped working, without needing to delete the channel.
Fixed: the MuMu "Turn On" button now waits for the instance to actually finish starting before reporting its status.
The trade/injection automation is now protected against stuck confirmation windows, and no longer freezes waiting for a click that never comes.
